gaps: chunk boundary splits lose billing data
charge_amount computed but ignored — always claims full pre-auth
signature not checked against credit account spending key
gas cost unbounded (2 txs per request)
max_spend_per_request and min_credit_balance config never read
stdout/stderr pipe deadlock (won't start under load)
no maxTokens validation against model config
receive() accepts ETH with no accounting
Number() precision loss for large values

criticalBlockers: billing: charge_amount ignored, claims full pre-auth always
billing: signature not verified against credit account
vllm: pipe deadlock — stdout/stderr not drained
vllm: lib.rs .expect() panics on error, kills operator
contract: onBlueprintCreated has no access control
streaming: chunk boundary splits silently skip billing
independentAudit.verdict: Foreman rated this 10/10. Independent audit rates it 4/10. The gap is: deterministic checks verify syntax and compilation, not economic security or production reliability. The billing flow — the entire economic model — has multiple bugs that would result in operators giving away free inference or users being overcharged.

learnings: cargo test + clippy passing does NOT mean production-ready
billing/payment flows need dedicated security-focused tests
LLM reviewer rubber-stamps when deterministic checks pass
the 'quality 10/10' score from the reviewer was wrong
need domain-specific audit (billing, crypto, subprocess) not just code quality
